title: Ongoing Climb in Chinese Coal Imports; Decline in Chinese Iron Ore Imports
section_path: Ongoing Climb in Chinese Coal Imports; Decline in Chinese Iron Ore Imports
section_path_text: Ongoing Climb in Chinese Coal Imports; Decline in Chinese Iron Ore Imports
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
China imported 30.2 million tons of coal in July. This has marked a month-on-month increase of 1.8 million tons (6%) and a year-on-year increase of 4.1 million tons (16%). Coal imports have remained on a turnaround since June, and last month's volume has marked the largest amount imported since December.
